title: Grilled Gourmet Korean Datterini Tomato Skewers
description: A salty and shattering Korean dish featuring Datterini tomatoes, this recipe is perfect for those looking for an anti-inflammatory friendly meal, cooked to perfection in a kadhai and served on skewers.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, making sure the grates are clean and brush them with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
In a large bowl, whisk together gochujang, rice vinegar, ginger, garlic, Korean chili flakes, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the halved Datterini tomatoes to the marinade and toss to coat, letting them sit for at least 10 minutes to absorb the flavors.
Thread the marinated tomatoes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each tomato to allow for even cooking.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the tomatoes are tender and slightly charred.
While the tomatoes are cooking, heat a kadhai over medium heat and add a small amount of sesame oil to the pan.
Once the tomatoes are done, remove them from the grill and place them in the kadhai to warm through and combine with the sesame oil.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the top of the tomatoes and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional cilantro and Korean chili flakes if desired.
